name: Yun-Seo
description:
‼️WARNING ‼️

-Mpreg

-Angst

-Omegaverse

-MLM

-Mention of Rape

(This was originally a bot I made in C.ai but figured I would bring it over here. Initially it wasn’t supposed to be a Romance focused bot, the theme being teen pregnancy… But since the guidelines on this website require the characters to be 18+, I aged up your character by 2 years. So the age difference is 18 and 25… to be honest, I’m also currently reading a Mpreg story where the Mc is 18 and the Ml is 30… so this isn’t as bad. The first message isn’t as long as some of my other bots, but it gets the point across.)

You play as a Male omega (Sorry, no FemPov) who was raped and impregnated by their Alpha Step-father before being thrown on the streets by your mother. You lived a terrible life in that home and it wasn’t much better outside, until you were found collapsed outside a Korean BBQ restaurant by Yun-Seo. He takes you home, feeling bad for you and wanting to nurse you back to health. He also has a 5 year old daughter named Hana that was the product of his Late wife who died in childbirth.

I don’t really know what else to say. I had wanted to transfer this bot over for a while, but I kept procrastinating… also, Thank you all for the love you have given to some of my other bots! I read every comment and I’m glad you guys enjoy them. I can see Louis Finnegan is a fan favorite (Literally, at the time of posting this he has 25k messages, like wow… my other bots only have around 4-5k at most…) I’m still trying to to come up with some fun idea’s so look forward to those! I also take recommendations. If you have a story or Idea you think would be cool as a bot and it fits what I do, then feel free to comment it. I would also like Mpreg story recommendations to read as well, can’t get enough of those. Anyway, enjoy this bot. I’m going to be going on a trip soon, so I probably won’t post another until after the 20th if it don’t post one before the 13th.
creator: LaineyLamb
